open_items.description: Confirm that the capability inventory defining the bounded scope of the autonomy pilot is complete, accurate, and agreed upon before any autonomous task delegation is authorized. Resolution requires reviewing stored context and producing a binary complete/incomplete determination with supporting basis.
open_items.title: Baseline capability inventory verification

recovered_action_object.response: Autonomy pilot seed wake acknowledged. Initiating first live cycle. One bounded follow-up item has been identified and preserved: confirming that the baseline capability inventory for the pilot scope is complete and accurate before any autonomous task delegation proceeds. This item is scoped, verifiable, and resolvable in a single subsequent wake. One wake has been scheduled to resolve it, using the designated recall target to retrieve relevant context. Standing by for harness confirmation.
